programme.title: Miami Blues
programme.desc: Fred Ward, Alec Baldwin and Jennifer Jason Leigh star in this deliciously offbeat black comedy about a murdering thief, his streetwalker-gone-straight wife and the denture-wearing cop who is closing in on his trail. Nora Dunn co-stars.

programme.title: Dark Blue
programme.desc: When the LAPD's elite Special Investigations Squad (SIS) is assigned a high-profile quadruple homicide, veteran detective Eldon Perry (Kurt Russell) takes the case. Known for his tough street tactics and a fiery temper, Eldon also tutors rookie Bobby Keough (Scott Speedman) in the grim realities of police intimidation and corruption. While navigating the tumultuous neighborhoods of South Central L.A., Perry and Keough must track down the cold-blooded killers as well as face their own demons - demons that prove more ruthless than the criminals they pursue.

programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a seasoned cop (Robert Duvall) and his new partner (Sean Penn) are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: At Close Range
programme.desc: A farm boy (Sean Penn) looking for excitement finds himself on a collision course with his smooth-talking gang leader father (Christopher Walken) in this "powerfully disturbing" (Newsweek) tale based on the story of real-life killer Bruce Johnston.

programme.title: Thief
programme.desc: Michael Mann ("Manhunter") directs this stylish, action-packed drama that stars James Caan ("Misery") as a master safe cracker who is planning his last heist for the sake of a woman, Tuesday Weld ("Who'll Stop The Rain?"), and a new life.

programme.title: To Live And Die In L.A.
programme.desc: Federal agent Richard Chance has a score to settle, and he's through playing by the rules. He vows to take down a murderous counterfeiter by any means necessary.

programme.title: Rush
programme.desc: Two undercover officers spiral out of control, becoming lovers and addicts as they infiltrate a local drug scene to bring down a supplier.

programme.title: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: This masterful film noir about five small-time crooks and a mysterious underworld crime boss enraptured audiences, earning a reputation as a "new classic."

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Robert De Niro, Jean Reno and Stellan Skarsgard headline a stellar cast in director John Frankenheimer's action-packed and intelligent spy thriller about a group of for-hire mercenaries out to steal a top-secret briefcase for a mysterious client.

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A couple (David Duchovny, Michelle Forbes) sets out on a cross-country trip to research a book about serial killers and, along the way, pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend (Brad Pitt, Juliette Lewis) who take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: The Mod Squad
programme.desc: Julie (Claire Danes), Pete (Giovanni Ribisi) and Linc (Omar Epps) are three problem teens headed to jail...until Captain Greer (Dennis Farina) offers them a deal to work for him and go undercover in the hip L.A. club scene. It’s a case that the cops can’t crack, but when Greer sends in his new task force – The Mod Squad – they quickly uncover a crime ring involving drugs, hookers...and dirty cops!

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: When police officer Xavier Quinn (Denzel Washington) learns that his childhood friend has become the prime suspect in a murder case, he also discovers that he's the only one who feels that his friend was framed to protect the local tourism business.
